scripts.deploy:production: pnpm run db:migrate:production && wrangler deploy --minify --env production
scripts.deploy:staging: pnpm run db:migrate:staging && wrangler deploy --minify --env staging
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply unbound-api --remote --env production
scripts.db:migrate:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply unbound-api --remote --env production
scripts.db:migrate:staging: wrangler d1 migrations apply unbound-api-staging --remote --env staging
